title: LLM Reasoning Evaluation Pack
summary: Public reasoning-oriented evaluation pack for comparing evidence alignment and unsupported-claim rates across harnesses.
usage: compare Claude and Codex reasoning outputs on the same cases
keep reasoning scores separate from deterministic benchmark metrics

license.name: Mixed upstream public sources
license.notes: Check individual benchmark and paper terms before storing redistributed cases.

sources.name: VariantBench
sources.notes: Primary reference for reasoning-oriented evaluation in variant interpretation.

artifacts.name: result_schema
artifacts.description: Structured output shape for reasoning comparisons.

caveats: Reasoning quality should not be merged into one score with benchmark precision and recall.
Treat unsupported claims as first-class failures.
